## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated (TDD: tests written first)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run test:run` passes (all 165+ tests)
- [ ] `shellcheck scripts/*.sh` clean
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if notable
